---
title: "Metacycle analysis of Xenium circadian disruption experiment (Salk2025)"
format: html
server: shiny
Authors: HC, TC, YS
---



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(arrow)
library(MetaCycle)
```


```{r}
source("/media/volume/volume_spatial/tiffany/Xenium-workflow/ref_function.R")

setwd("/media/volume/volume_spatial/tiffany/250618")
date = Sys.Date()
run_name = "circa4"
condition = c("celltype", "region")
condition_string <- paste(condition, collapse = "_and_")
circascore = "all"
sudoreplicates = 3

siglist <- list()
clocklist = list()
path_to_save = paste0("./Results/",date,"_",run_name,"_",condition_string)
dir.create(path_to_save)
dir.create(paste0(path_to_save,"/Raw"))
dir.create(paste0(path_to_save,"/Summary"))

```

Data import and pre-processing
```{r}

data = PreProcessingData(run_name, circascore)

if ("celltype" %in% condition){
  celltypes = GetValidCells(run_name)
}

if ("region" %in% condition){
  regions = GetValidRegions(run_name)
}

```

Run MetaCycle for all conditions

```{r}
MetaCycleAnalysis(data, condition, run_name, path_to_save, date)

```
